pr.title: feat: plan-002 finalization — plan doc + U1 descriptor-drift telemetry + U7 engine-reader handoff
pr.body:
## Summary

Two Replit-Agent-authored commits that finalize plan **2026-05-13-002** (property-assumptions-restructure-finish) and ship its first non-engine unit.

### Commit 1 — `Finalize property assumptions restructure plan and apply design standards`
Adds `docs/plans/2026-05-13-002-feat-property-assumptions-restructure-finish-plan.md` (+213 lines, new). Standard plan doc shape — units U1-U8, rationale, milestones, deferred-Milestone-B references.

### Commit 2 — `feat(descriptor-drift): persist drift events + write U7 engine-reader handoff`
Plan-002 **U1** implementation + the U7 engine-reader handoff doc:

- `lib/db/migrations/0057_descriptor_drift_log.sql` — new migration creating `property_descriptor_drift_log` table.
- `lib/db/src/schema/property-descriptor-drift-log.ts` — Drizzle schema.
- `lib/db/src/schema/index.ts` + `lib/db/migrations/meta/_journal.json` — wiring.
- `artifacts/api-server/src/storage/property-descriptor-drift-log.ts` — storage adapter.
- `artifacts/api-server/src/storage/index.ts` — registration.
- `artifacts/api-server/src/routes/properties.ts` — write-path hook that records drift events on save.
- `docs/handoffs/property-descriptor-engine-reader-migration-2026-05-13.md` — the U7 engine-reader handoff (already consumed by **PR #144**, which shipped the U7 implementation against this doc).

## Migration slot 0057 conflict — flagged

The seed-calibration workstream's paused branch `feat/seed-calibration-bracket-defaults` also uses `lib/db/migrations/0057_*.sql` (for the refi-LTV cap migration in plan-001 U2). Both can't live at slot 0057. Disposition:

- This PR ships `0057_descriptor_drift_log.sql` first; the seed-calibration branch will rebase + renumber its migration to `0058_property_refi_max_ltv_cap.sql` when that workstream resumes. The `artifacts/api-server/migrations/` mirror slot for the refi-cap (`0064`) is unaffected — only the `lib/db/migrations/` slot needs renumbering.

## Test plan

- [ ] CI typecheck + tests green.
- [ ] `check:migration-guards` passes (new entry needs declaration — verify the commit author included it).
- [ ] `check:schema-drift` passes.

Authored by **Replit Agent**; pushed by shell CC.
